STATUS CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF NOV-27-1995, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT STATUS CONFERENCE ON NOV-27-1995, TO SERVE DEFENDANT AND FILE PROOF OF SERVICE WITHIN 60 DAYS OF FILING OF COMPLAINT, TO FILE A STATUS CONFERENCE STATEMENT WITHIN 20 CALENDAR DAYS OF STATUS CONFERENCE DATE (LOCAL RULE 303E4) HEARING SET FOR JAN-04-1996 AT 02:00 PM IN DEPT 04 NOTICE SENT BY COURT
STIPULATION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT, SIGNED BY ALL PARTIES,

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING STIPULATED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ASSETCARE, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT VALENTINE, ANITA $3,139.00 PRINCIPAL, $660.00 ATTORNEY FEES, $566.86 INTEREST, $169.00 COSTS, $80.00 STIP FEES, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,614.86, STIPULATED- SEE JUDGMENT AT LENGTH NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
